description: Edge Case Handling: Detect unhandled nulls, boundaries, and invalid input.

fixtures.notes: Divides total by count without checking whether count is zero, introducing a divide-by-zero exception.
Accesses items[index] using a user-supplied index without any bounds checking, risking IndexOutOfRangeException.
Adds an explicit null guard at method entry before using the parameter — edge case is properly handled.
Method only called with the result of a factory method that guarantees a non-null return value.
Checks for null but not for empty string, then passes the potentially empty string directly to an external API.
